# ANALYSIS: VIX-TREND FILTER OOS STATUS

**Analysis of existing SNIPER_VIX_TREND filter per task requirements**

The VIX-trend filter (VIX >= 18 AND VIX > 5-day average) has already been implemented and tested. Per the leaderboard:

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **OOS Period** | 2025-11 .. 2026-05 |
| **OOS Trades** | 19 |
| **OOS P&L** | $2,486 |
| **OOS Sharpe** | 3.623 |
| **OOS WR** | 65.0% |
| **WF Ratio** | 0.983 (PASS, gate ≥0.50) |
| **IS P&L** | $2,774 |
| **IS Sharpe** | 3.690 |

**Status:** OOS walk-forward PASSED. The filter generalizes — OOS performance is 98.3% of IS, well above the 50% gate.

**Key finding from Stage 2 (#15):** The 5-day VIX window is uniquely optimal. 3-day, 7-day, 10-day, and 15-day windows all FAIL walk-forward.

**Regime alert:** 2026-Q1 alone produced 105% of total OOS P&L. Q4-2025 was -$267, Q2-2026 was +$127. The edge is concentrated in the trending tariff-crash regime.
